title: Wili's Pikmins
description: Adds Pikmin and Pikmin-related features for a personal modpack/server
body:
# About
This mod adds Pikmin inspired mobs to Minecraft, as well as other features found in the Pikmin series.

# Features
- Find 7 different Pikmin types buried throughout the world. Pluck them from the ground to create your Pikmin army!
- Onions allow you to store your Pikmin. Find multiple onions to upgrade your storage capacity!
- Nectar eggs drop delicious nectar when broken. Feed your Pikmin to make them faster and stronger!

*Requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)*
